zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Henry Dymoke於1260年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾時，他的父親Nicholas Dimmock40歲，母親Margaret Welles28歲。他於1289年與Dionisia Du Plessis在英國英格蘭藍卡爾蘭卡斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1299年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比享年39歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Henry Dymoke于1260年出生在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾时，他的父亲Nicholas Dimmock40岁，母亲Margaret Welles28岁。他于1289年与Dionisia Du Plessis在英国英格兰藍卡爾蘭卡斯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1299年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比享年39岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾史可萊維利斯比。

nameMeanings.name: Dymoke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Dimmock
meanings: English: habitational name from Dymock in Gloucestershire; see   Dimock  .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Henry Dymoke was born in 1260, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Nicholas Dimmock, was 40 and his mother, Margaret Welles, was 28. He married Dionisia Du Plessis in 1289, in Lancaster, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1299, in Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 39, and was buried in Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Henry Dymoke est né en 1260, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicholas Dimmock, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Margaret Welles, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Dionisia Du Plessis en 1289, à Lancaster, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1299, à Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Henry Dymoke 1260 in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Dimmock 40 und seine Mutter Margaret Welles 28. Er hat 1289 in Lancaster, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Dionisia Du Plessis geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1299 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Dymoke è nato il nel 1260 nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Nicholas Dimmock, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Welles, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Dionisia Du Plessis nel 1289, nel Lancaster, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1299, nel Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Dymokeが1260年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアで生まれた時，父Nicholas Dimmockは40歳，母Margaret Wellesは28歳であった。1289年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアランカスターでDionisia Du Plessisと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1299年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスクリベルスビーで39歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスクリベルスビーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Henry Dymoke(이)가 1260년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Dimmock(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Welles(은)는 28세였다. 그는 1289년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 랭커스터에서 Dionisia Du Plessis(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1299년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스크라이벨스비에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스크라이벨스비에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Henry Dymoke nasceu em 1260, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Nicholas Dimmock, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Welles, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Dionisia Du Plessis em 1289, em Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1299, em Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Henry Dymoke родился в 1260 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nicholas Dimmock было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Welles, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Dionisia Du Plessis в 1289 г. в местности ланкастир, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1299 г. в местности скривелсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности скривелсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Henry Dymoke nació en 1260, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Nicholas Dimmock, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Margaret Welles, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Dionisia Du Plessis en 1289, en Lancaster, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1299, en Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultado en Scrivelsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
